targets.boundary: Company-wide operations and value chain, including consumer hardware products
targets.notes: Net-zero to be achieved through emissions reductions across all scopes with remaining emissions neutralized by high-quality carbon removals.
targets.title: Net-zero emissions across operations and value chain by 2030

targets.boundary: Global Google data centers and office campuses
targets.notes: Target is to match electricity demand with carbon-free energy on an hourly basis rather than only annual renewable energy purchases.
targets.title: 24/7 carbon-free energy for all data centers and offices by 2030
